title: Claude Code Skills Pack: User Story Writing — 5 Skills for Turning Requirements Into Actionable Tickets
description: For product managers and business analysts, this pack converts raw feature requests into well-structured user stories, acceptance criteria, edge case lists, definition-of-done checklists, and Jira-ready ticket descriptions so they can eliminate ambiguity before development starts
gumroad_description:
Vague tickets are where sprint velocity goes to die.

Who this is for:
— Product managers writing stories faster than they can be properly defined
— Business analysts translating stakeholder requests that change meaning every meeting
— Delivery leads who've watched engineers build the wrong thing from an ambiguous ticket

What's inside:
— Skill 1: User story generator from raw feature requests
— Skill 2: Acceptance criteria writer
— Skill 3: Edge case and error state identifier
— Skill 4: Definition-of-done checklist builder
— Skill 5: Jira-ready ticket description formatter
— Installation guide + quick-reference trigger table

Zero ambiguity before development starts. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
